summary: W923 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W922's target-difference Function.Surjective leaf as a primitive preimage quantifier. The new targetDifferenceSurjectivePrimitiveW923 field states that every element of the target codomain has a preimage under the target difference map, and targetDifferenceSurjectiveOfPrimitiveW923 reconstructs W922's Function.Surjective field before projecting through the W922 route. Product success remains false because all W923 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W923 exposes the target-difference Function.Surjective field as a primitive preimage quantifier, but that primitive field and the rest of the W923 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W923 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W923 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions inherited through W920, the primitive target-difference preimage quantifier, raw target compactness proposition, primitive selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-set image propositions, the primitive mapped explicit cokernel closed-set image proposition, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W923 closed-map target-surjective-primitive-field explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, endpoint facts, localized-right-adjoint data, source-category triangulation evidence, relation primitive proofs, target-surjectivity proof, target-compactness proof, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, selected-difference primitive proofs, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
